summary.summary: Move profile creation before autosens in APSManager startup. The patch (Trio/Sources/APS/APSManager.swift) removes a small amount of previous parallelism (async let) and instead calls openAPS.createProfiles(useSwiftOref:), then awaits fetchCurrentTempBasal and autosense sequentially, and passes the fetched currentTemp into openAPS.determineBasal. (See diff and commits.)
summary.userFacingImpact: This change addresses the Swift autosens assumption that a profile object exists at startup: by creating profiles before calling autosense it is expected to prevent the autosens exception reported for systems started with oref-swift and allow the algorithm to make progress on cold start. The patch description and diff state this intent, but runtime verification is recommended—please run/validate cold-start behavior in your environment.
